template.name: TV Tube
template.t:
<!DOCTYPE html>
                
                    

                        
                        
                        Live TV | 24/7 Channels
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                            tailwind.config = {
                                darkMode: 'class',
                                theme: {
                                    extend: {
                                        colors: {
                                            brand: {
                                                50: '#fef2f2',
                                                100: '#fee2e2',
                                                500: '#ef4444',
                                                600: '#dc2626',
                                                900: '#7f1d1d',
                                            }
                                        },
                                        animation: {
                                            'pulse-slow': 'pulse 3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite',
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                            startCommonAppsAI();
                        
                        
                        

                            

                                

                                    

                                        Go to Pi Browser
                                    
                                    

                                        Click here
                                    
                                
                                

                                    

                                        Pay Pi to GET PREMIUM
                                    
                                    

                                        Click here
                                    
                                    

                                        

                                        Or here to test this app
                                    
                                
                                

                                    Loading...
                                
                            
                        
                        
                        
                        
You need to access from Pi Browser.

                    
                    

                        
                        
                            

                                

                                    
                                    Live TV 
                                    
                                
                                
                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                        

                        

                            

                                

                                
                                    $( document ).ready(function() {
                                        $("#translate_text_latinchain_2").appendTo(".translate_here");
                                        $("#google_translate_element").appendTo(".translate_here");
                                        
                                        $("#translate_text_latinchain_2").show();
                                        $("#google_translate_element").show();
                                    });
                                
                                
                                

                                
                                

                            

                            
                            

                                
                                

                                    

                                        
                                        Live TV
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                    
                                
                                
                                
                                

                                    
                                
                                
                                
                                

                                    

                                        
Select a channel
                                        
...
                                    
                                    
                                    
                                    

                                    
                                        
                                        Watch original if it doesn't load
                                    
                                    
                                
                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    
                                    
Note: Some channels block playback outside of YouTube. If a channel shows "Video unavailable", use the red button below the player to open it directly in the YouTube app or website.
                                
                            

                            
                            

                                

                                    

                                        
                                    
                                    
                                

                                
                                

                                    All
                                    News
                                    Radio
                                    Exploration
                                    Entertainment
                                    Sport
                                    Cartoon
                                    
                                
                            

                            
                            

                                
                            

                            
                            

                                
                                
No channels found
                                
Try a different search.
